/usr/bin/ar qc libtests.a CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_sipnet_infrastructure/testParamInput.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_sipnet_infrastructure/testClimInput.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_infrastructure/testEventInfra.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_infrastructure/testEventOutputFile.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_infrastructure/testEventInfraNeg.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_types/testEventPlanting.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_types/testEventIrrigation.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_types/testEventFertilization.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_types/testEventHarvest.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_events_types/testEventTillage.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_bugfixes/testEventFileOrderChecks.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_modeling/testNitrogenCycle.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_modeling/testDependencyFunctions.c.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/sipnet/test_modeling/testBalance.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtests.a
